name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Execution DLL of Choice Using WAB
notes:
This Building Block detects that the path to the DLL written in the registry is different from the default one. Launched WAB.exe tries to load the DLL from Registry.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: oscd.community, Natalia Shornikova
SIGMA Title: Execution DLL of Choice Using WAB.EXE
SIGMA Description: This rule detects that the path to the DLL written in the registry is different from the default one. Launched WAB.exe tries to load the DLL from Registry.


Confidence: LOW

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Execution DLL of Choice Using WAB on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Successful Registry Modification
when the event matches (LOWER("Target Object") LIKE '%\software\microsoft\wab\dllpath') or (LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%\software\microsoft\wab\dllpath') AQL filter query
when the event matches ("Registry Value Data"=='%CommonProgramFiles%\System\wab32.dll') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Execution DLL of Choice Using WAB on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Successful Registry Modification
AND when the event matches (LOWER("Target Object") LIKE '%\software\microsoft\wab\dllpath') or (LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%\software\microsoft\wab\dllpath') AQL filter query
AND NOT when the event matches ("Registry Value Data"=='%CommonProgramFiles%\System\wab32.dll') AQL filter query
